constraint_random_test.name: case2_z3_constraints
hard_constraints: reset is asserted only in the reset prefix and deasserted before payload transfer
source and sink never drive X/Z values
DROP_BAD_FRAME == 0 and DROP_WHEN_FULL == 0 for the public legal run
the generator must emit both tb/input.mem and tb/output.mem in the schema described by vector_io_schema.json
coverage_guidance_constraints: at least 20 percent of frames have a non-multiple-of-8 length
at least 20 percent of frames are longer than the 64-bit source lane width
enable source valid gaps on at least 10 percent of cycles
enable sink backpressure through m_axis_tready on at least 20 percent of cycles
include FIFO empty, partially filled, and near-full periods

objective.primary: maximize uncovered line, branch, and functional coverage in case2 and its dependencies
objective.secondary: exercise downsize conversion, FIFO fill/drain, tlast, tid, and tdest propagation

vcs_execution_model.method: A generator writes tb/input.mem and tb/output.mem. The Verilog testbench checks them with VCS/URG, then analyze_functional_coverage.py samples the verified vectors for functional-bin coverage.
vcs_execution_model.current_measured_vector_run: tb/case2_tb.v with existing tb/input.mem and tb/output.mem
